violations.description: Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Condiment was not properly protected from contamination. No tongs or similar utensil was provided for the bread station in the breakfast area.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Duct tape being used to hold food on the inside of the door of the refrigerator.--Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Bottom inside of the cupboards in the breakfast area storing single-use items are made of particle board and not a nonabsorbent surface.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Shelving above the 3 compartment sink in the prep area are chipping and are no longer a cleanable surface.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the reach-in cooler in the prep area and the inside of the prep area microwave need to be cleaned.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. Spray cans of glass cleaner stored on the same shelf as single-use cups and gloves.--Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. Chemical spray bottle in the cupboard above the hand sink was not labeled.
